## Perspective Audit Summary **Component/artifact reviewed:** AddressAutocomplete.jsx **Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Keyboard Motor (HIGH), Screen Reader Semantic (MEDIUM), Cognitive Neurodivergent (HIGH) **Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification & Reflow, Environmental Contrast, Vestibular & Motion, Auditory Access ### Findings by Severity | Severity | Count | |---|---| | CRITICAL | 1 | | MAJOR | 4 | | MINOR | 1 | | ENHANCEMENT | 0 | ### Perspectives That Passed None of the three escalated perspectives fully passed. All require remediation. ### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role **Front-End Dev** - **Keyboard trap in autocomplete suggestions** — Keyboard Motor — CRITICAL — 2.1.2 No Keyboard Trap - **Missing ARIA roles for suggestions list** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value - **No live region for suggestions appearance** — Screen Reader Semantic — MAJOR — 4.1.3 Status Messages **UX Design** - **800ms timeout too short for cognitive needs** — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MINOR — 2.2.1 Timeout **Content Author** - **Error message lacks corrective action** — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 3.3.3 Error Suggestion ### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification None in this code review (all findings are code-level). ### Recommended Next Step **REVISE** (MAJOR findings present — address before shipping) --- ### A11y Evidence Findings ``` ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: keyboard-trap-autocomplete fingerprint: 3a7d4e1f source: perspective-audit Keyboard Motor checklist wcag_or_apg: 2.1.2 No Keyboard Trap section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(f) severity: CRITICAL perspective_alarms: keyboard_motor=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM, cognitive_neurodivergent=HIGH evidence: JSX: suggestions.map((addr, i) =>
handleSelect(addr)} />) reproduction_steps: Tab to address input, type to get suggestions, use arrow keys to navigate expected_behavior: All suggestions should be focusable and selectable via keyboard actual_behavior: Suggestions are only selectable via mouse click trend: new ``` ``` ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: missing-aria-autocomplete fingerprint: 5b8c2f9e source: perspective-audit Screen Reader Semantic checklist wcag_or_apg: 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(a) severity: MAJOR perspective_alarms: keyboard_motor=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM, cognitive_neurodivergent=HIGH evidence: JSX:
...
reproduction_steps: Screen reader user navigating suggestions list expected_behavior: Suggestions list should use role="listbox" with role="option" items actual_behavior: Suggestions are unannounced as selectable items trend: new ``` ``` ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: no-live-region-autocomplete fingerprint: 7c3d9a2b source: perspective-audit Screen Reader Semantic checklist wcag_or_apg: 4.1.3 Status Messages section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(j) severity: MAJOR perspective_alarms: keyboard_motor=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM, cognitive_neurodivergent=HIGH evidence: JSX: No aria-live attributes on suggestions container reproduction_steps: Screen reader user typing to get suggestions expected_behavior: Screen reader should announce when suggestions appear actual_behavior: Suggestions appear silently trend: new ``` ``` ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: error-no-suggestion fingerprint: 9d4e8c1a source: perspective-audit Cognitive Neurodivergent checklist wcag_or_apg: 3.3.3 Error Suggestion section_508_fpc_context: 1194.31(c) severity: MAJOR perspective_alarms: keyboard_motor=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM, cognitive_neurodivergent=HIGH evidence: JSX:

No matching addresses found.

reproduction_steps: Type invalid address and observe error message expected_behavior: Error should suggest specific corrective actions actual_behavior: Error message only states problem trend: new ``` ``` ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: timeout-too-short fingerprint: 1e9f3c7d source: perspective-audit Cognitive Neurodivergent checklist wcag_or_apg: 2.2.1 Timeout section_508_fpc_context: 1194.20(c) severity: MINOR perspective_alarms: keyboard_motor=HIGH, screen_reader_semantic=MEDIUM, cognitive_neurodivergent=HIGH evidence: JS: timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(() => setShowSuggestions(false), 800); reproduction_steps: Type slowly while suggestions are visible expected_behavior: Timeout should allow 2000ms for cognitive needs actual_behavior: Suggestions disappear after 800ms trend: new ``` --- ### Detailed Findings **Finding:** Suggestions list is keyboard-navigable but not keyboard-selectable **WCAG:** 2.1.2 No Keyboard Trap **Perspective:** Keyboard Motor **Severity:** CRITICAL **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: UX Design) **Evidence:** JSX: suggestions.map((addr, i) =>
handleSelect(addr)} />) **Fix:** Add `tabIndex={-1}` to each suggestion item and ensure keyboard selection works without mouse **Finding:** Suggestions list lacks ARIA roles for screen readers **WCAG:** 4.1.2 Name, Role, Value **Perspective:** Screen Reader Semantic **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Front-End Dev (secondary: Content Author) **Evidence:** JSX:
...
No matching addresses found.

**Fix:** Add "Try typing a different variation" or similar suggestion **Finding:** 800ms timeout too short for cognitive needs **WCAG:** 2.2.1 Timeout **Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent **Severity:** MINOR **Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** JS: timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(() => setShowSuggestions(false), 800); **Fix:** Increase timeout to 2000ms and add "Show more results" button
